job_description:
# Sr. Healthcare Data Analyst
Company: General Dynamics
Source: Dice
Employment type: Full-time
Checked: April 27, 2026
URL: https://www.dice.com/job-detail/65425287-8026-4c9e-a5d5-5d2c4fb538ed

- Remote senior healthcare analyst role.
- Mentions Medicare, Medicaid, SQL, Python, Databricks, and analytics.

replacements.replace: Senior Healthcare Data Analyst | SQL | Data Quality | Healthcare Analytics
replacements.find: ETL Analyst | Healthcare Data Analyst | Data Quality & Warehouse Analyst

replacements.replace: Healthcare Data & ETL Analyst with 7+ years of experience validating, reconciling, and delivering trusted enterprise data across healthcare and regulated domains. Strong expertise in advanced SQL, ETL validation, data quality, and collaboration across business and technical teams to support reliable healthcare analytics and reporting.
replacements.find: Healthcare Data & ETL Analyst with 7+ years of experience validating, reconciling, and delivering trusted enterprise data across healthcare (payer), banking, retail, and e-commerce domains. Deep hands-on expertise in advanced SQL, ETL validation, source-to-target testing, data quality, data warehousing, and production data support. Currently extending core skills into Snowflake, Databricks, Azure Data Factory, and Python to support cloud modernization and AI-ready data pipelines. Proven partner to engineering, QA, and business stakeholders—translating mapping documents and business rules into validation frameworks that protect reporting accuracy, regulatory compliance, and downstream analytics readiness.

replacements.replace: Self-directed learning in Snowflake, Databricks, Python-based validation, and Azure Data Factory—building cloud and analytics-ready capabilities to extend enterprise healthcare data expertise into modern data stacks.
replacements.find: Self-directed learning in Snowflake, Databricks, Python-based validation, and Azure Data Factory—building cloud and AI-ready data pipeline competencies to extend enterprise ETL expertise into modern data stacks.

gaps: Role leans data science/engineering and leadership
Fraud/abuse and modeling emphasis is beyond current resume
notes: Stretch fit. Tailoring keeps focus on healthcare analytics, SQL, and quality-oriented delivery rather than predictive modeling.
